title: Freezer 3 cleanout 2026-05-05
description: Reorganizing -80 freezer 3, shelf 2 (what was kept and what was discarded).

entries.title: 2026-05-05: freezer cleanout
entries.content:
Reorganizing -80 freezer 3 (shelf 2).

Kept:
- pYES-GAL1::flbA glycerols (8 tubes, FakeYeast-001 background)
- pDEMO-fluo stocks (4 tubes)
- Backup gDNA from the 2026-03 transformation batch

Discarded (logged in the chemical waste book):
- 12 unlabeled tubes, gray caps, no date (assumed >2 years old)
- Half a box of FakeYeast WT glycerols from 2024 (have fresher stock)
- Two leaking SOC aliquots

Action: morgan to back up the pYES glycerols into freezer 5 before any future cleanout.
